# Veloadout

> Bikepacking gear volume calculator — plan your bike touring setup with confidence.

Veloadout helps cyclists calculate the total volume and weight of their bikepacking gear so they can choose the right bags before hitting the trail.

## What it does

- Search for specific gear items (tents, sleeping bags, pads, clothing, tools) by name
- AI-powered lookup: if an item isn't in the database, Claude searches the web and returns packed volume and weight for all size variants
- Add preset "standard" gear bundles with one click
- See real-time total volume and bag recommendation (frame bag, handlebar roll, seat pack, etc.)
- Save your gear list (requires free account via magic link)

## Who it's for

Bikepacking and bike touring cyclists planning multi-day or long-distance rides.

## Languages

English, German, Russian.

## Key URLs

- Homepage / calculator: https://veloadout.com
- English: https://veloadout.com/en
- German: https://veloadout.com/de
- Russian: https://veloadout.com/ru
